name: Tomoko Inose
description: She is Yuuya's older half-sister. A waitress at Inoya cafe, she attended Yomiyama North Middle School during 1983. Although aware of the rumors about class 3-3, she didn't believe them until her brother, fearing for her life, explained the situation to her. Katsumi Matsunaga is a regular at the cafe where she works.
